message:
🌱 Standardize design tokens: colors, typography, and semantic text (#1905)

- Replace non-standard Tailwind colors with standard palette across 158 files:
  emerald→green, amber→yellow, slate→gray, zinc→gray, violet→purple,
  rose→red, sky→blue, lime→green, fuchsia→purple, teal→cyan
- Replace text-gray-400 with text-muted-foreground for 192 UI text instances
  (preserving canonical definitions in statusColors.ts and accessibility.ts)
- Add text-2xs typography token (10px/14px) to tailwind.config.js
- Replace all 563 text-[10px] instances with text-2xs token
- Fix WeatherAnimation gradient flattened by sky→blue mapping
- Remove duplicate switch cases in NamespaceResources.tsx
- Update color name string literals in 7 files (rewards, StatsBlockDefinitions,
  PodDrillDown, ContributorLadder, ClusterGroups, NamespaceResources)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
